text.message: Do you really think I’ll win?
no, you'll solorob me and blue will win
It was a bad move from me
It was basically asking for war
You should put your road towards 11 4
If you want to play it smart
If you want to fight then sure come bring it on. My game is over already
I think road is good, I just should have left you port and go to 4 3:1
